title: TechTalk Series - Privacy & Cyber Readiness
content:
## TechTalk Series - Privacy & Cyber Readiness
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Technology Industry Group for an informative four-part webinar series where expert speakers will provide key insights on best practices and emerging issues in the tech world.
Privacy & Cyber Readiness: Hard Decisions in Uncertain Times
- Charles Morgan , National Co-leader of Cyber/Data Group, Partner, McCarthy Tétrault
- Daniel Glover , National Co-leader of Cyber/Data Group, Partner, McCarthy Tétrault
Note : All instructions and information on how to access the webinars will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This qualifies for up to 1 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This contains up to 1 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
If you have questions about this series, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
- Charles S. Morgan Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
People.Offices.Singular Montréal
- Daniel G.C. Glover Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
